# yescan-office-qoder

> An image-to-Office/PDF Agent Skill powered by Yescan. Converts images, screenshots, and scanned documents into editable Excel, Word, or PDF files with high-fidelity layout restoration. Runs inside QoderWork as an installable Agent Skill.

yescan-office-qoder is an open-source Agent Skill for [QoderWork](https://qoder.com), the desktop AI assistant by Qoder. It wraps the Yescan conversion API to transform image-based content into editable Office documents and PDFs. The skill supports three conversion scenes, matched automatically by the agent based on user intent.

## Supported Scenes

- [Image to Excel](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-office-qoder): tables, financial reports, data sheets → editable `.xlsx`
- [Image to Word](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-office-qoder): contracts, long-form text, product manuals → `.docx`
- [Image to PDF](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-office-qoder): handwritten notes, equipment nameplates, whiteboard sketches → standard `.pdf`

## Docs

- [README (bilingual: Chinese / English)](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-office-qoder/blob/main/README.md): installation, usage, CLI interface, constraints
- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-office-qoder/blob/main/SKILL.md): agent-facing skill definition with intent matching rules
- [Yescan Open Platform](https://scan.quark.cn/business): apply for API Key, API documentation

## Optional

- [ClawHub Skill Page](https://clawhub.ai/mozhihuidage/yescan-transoffice-universal): install, downloads, ratings
- [QoderWork](https://qoder.com): agent runtime environment
- [yescan-ai GitHub Org](https://github.com/yescan-ai): more skills in the yescan family
- [yescan-ocr-qoder](https://github.com/yescan-ai/yescan-ocr-qoder): sibling skill for text extraction and recognition
